error_signature: Number of parameters does not match the expected number of params
title: WhatsApp template parameter mismatch error
symptom: When sending a message using a WhatsApp template, the execution fails with 'Number of parameters does not match the expected number of params'. This occurs despite the parameters appearing correct in the preview.
not_this_if: Parameters are correctly defined as expected by the template
root_cause: The error occurs when the variable names in the WhatsApp template do not match the expected types. Specifically, if a variable is defined as 'name' but is sent as 'number', the node fails to execute properly.
fix_steps: Check the variable definitions in the WhatsApp template.
Ensure that the variable names match the expected types (e.g., use 'number' instead of 'name').
agent_instruction: Ensure that the variable names in the WhatsApp template match the expected types and try sending the message again.
